_comment: Activity Log - THE PULSE of clawmmand-center
_philosophy: Every action logged with DETAIL. Fresh timestamps = living system.

developments.title: Added copy buttons to all email/letter templates
developments.description: Every template (inquiry emails, recommendation requests, SOP outlines) now has one-click copy button. Click '📝 Template' → see full text → click '📋 Copy' → paste anywhere. No more manual copying from chat. Templates stored in Life Goals system, ready when you need them.
developments.expectedImprovement: Faster execution - one click to copy professional emails and letters, no switching between chat and email client

developments.title: Built Life Goals section - Research to Action Pipeline
developments.description: New dashboard section for organizing big goals (education, business, personal). Features: deadlines with countdown, action items with templates, contacts tracking, cost/scholarship management. Cornell Tech MBA/MS added as first test project with 7 deadlines, 8 actions, 2 contacts, $185K total cost, 4 scholarships tracked.
developments.expectedImprovement: Transform research chaos into actionable steps, never miss deadlines, track all contacts and costs systematically

developments.title: Added transcript: Bezos $100B AI manufacturing fund
developments.description: Transcribed TikTok: Bezos raising $100B for physical AI (factories, chips, aerospace) vs digital AI. Project Prometheus building physics-simulating AI. Yann LeCun ($1.1B) and Fei-Fei Li ($1B) making same bet. Physical AI era coming.
developments.expectedImprovement: New content added, transcript formatted with bold stats

developments.title: Article-style transcript formatting - bold quotes, stats, lists
developments.description: Transcripts now formatted like articles: quoted text bolded, numbers/stats highlighted ($400K, 3.2 to 1), list items in blue. Better typography (14px, 1.7 line height). Reads like a proper article, not plain text dump.
developments.expectedImprovement: More engaging reading experience, key points stand out

developments.title: Split view: Recent (visible) + Previous (collapsible section)
developments.description: Most recent transcript shown at top with '🔥 Most Recent' badge, transcript collapsed by default. All older transcripts grouped in collapsible 'Previous Transcripts' section. Click to expand section when needed. Saves massive space on mobile.
developments.expectedImprovement: Minimal scrolling, focus on latest content, older transcripts out of the way

developments.title: Auto-collapse old transcripts - only newest expanded
developments.description: Most recent transcript auto-expands on load. All older transcripts collapsed by default to save space. Click 'Show Transcript' to expand any collapsed one. Cleaner mobile view, less scrolling.
developments.expectedImprovement: Compact mobile view, focus on newest content

developments.title: Mobile-optimized transcript view - clean, scrollable, readable
developments.description: Removed clutter (likes, comments, music, duration). Now shows only title + transcript. Scrollable transcript box (300px max height). Smaller thumbnails (100px), compact layout for mobile. Click thumbnail to watch video.
developments.expectedImprovement: Better mobile reading experience, cleaner UI

developments.title: Site deployed and confirmed working
developments.description: Full dashboard live with all 4 sections rendering. Dark theme deployed. User confirmed UI design is much better.

developments.title: Fixed JSON import issues
developments.description: Inlined eventsData directly in component to avoid client-side JSON import errors. Site now renders without errors.

developments.title: Deployed fresh Vercel project
developments.description: Created new Vercel deployment to avoid cache conflicts from old builds. New URL: workspace-clawmmand.vercel.app

developments.title: Added TikTok transcript
developments.description: Processed TikTok: 'Manipulación: Evita las Trampas Comunes' by @one_1_ness. 310K likes, 1,946 comments. Duration: 1:33.

developments.title: Implemented relative dates
developments.description: Changed date format to 'Today', 'Tomorrow', 'In X days' so users don't need to track calendar dates.

developments.title: Changed distance to kilometers
developments.description: Converted from miles to KM for international visitors. Format: 'X.X km away'.

developments.title: Implemented detailed Activity Log format
developments.description: Each entry now shows: title, description, section tag, status badge, timestamp. Matches reference design.

developments.title: Fixed React component errors
developments.description: Moved all useState hooks to top of components. Moved styles to top of files. Fixed reference-before-definition errors.

developments.title: Rebuilt clawmmand-center from scratch
developments.description: Fresh deployment with new Vercel project to avoid old cache conflicts. All 4 sections working.
